data.body: Updated worktree from origin/main f2591071a -> 5a39f85eb (7 commits, audit-enrichment). Branch had no local commits so clean ff-merge. Killed the in-flight 21dd/36c7 plan-reviews (would have signed stale against old SHA) and relaunched them against 5a39f85eb. Epic already in_progress so its stale attestation is moot (no re-gate on claimed parent). Verified 21dd seams unchanged by the update (lock.py:289, reconcile:776/790); only _cli/__init__.py changed (affects 36c7 main()-wrap, will re-map).
